entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0022 (PS0010) awarded to CGI FEDERAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING AMENDED SECTIONS OF THE ALLIANT 2 GWAC. ATTACHMENT J-5.A.2.1 DEFINITION OF PARTICIPATION PARTICIPATION CREDIT FOR PROPOSALS UNDER A MULTIPHASE SOLICITATION THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0022 (PS0011) awarded to CGI FEDERAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO INCREASE THE MAXIMUM CEILING VALUE OF ALLIANT 2 GWAC FROM $50 BILLION TO $75 BILLION DOLLARS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: OMB DESIGNATES GSA AS EXEC_AGENT FOR GOVERNMENTWIDE IT 5112(E) OF CLINGER-COHEN ACT 40 U.S.C. 11302E

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0022 (PS0015) awarded to CGI FEDERAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING AMENDED SECTIONS OF THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) PERTAINING TO FAR CLAUSE 52.204-27 PROHIBITION ON A BYTEDANCE COVERED APPLICATION TO YOUR GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC).

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0022 (PS0017) awarded to CGI FEDERAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION IS TO INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING AMENDED SECTIONS OF THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION REGULATION (FAR) PERTAINING TO FAR CLAUSE 52.204-30 FEDERAL ACQUISITION SUPPLY CHAIN SECURITY ACT ORDERS-PROHIBITION WITH ALTERNATE I TO YOUR GOVERNMENTWIDE ACQUISITION CONTRACT (GWAC). THIS MODIFICATION SUPERSEDES ANY PREVIOUS VERSION OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS BILATERAL MODIFICATION INCORPORATES THE APPROVED REVOLUTIONARY FAR OVERHAUL (RFO) DEVIATIONS PURSUANT TO GSA CLASS DEVIATION(S) ON AN INTERIM BASIS.

entry.title: GWAC 47QTCK18D0022 (PS0028) awarded to CGI FEDERAL INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: FAR 16.505 Fair Opportunity. Only Contracting Officers with delegated procurement authority issued by the GSA GWAC Program. Ordering Period is (1) One 5-Year Base Period; and (2) One 5-Year Option Period.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BILATERAL, NO-COST MODIFICATION IS TO IMPLEMENT EXECUTIVE ORDER (EO) 14398, ADDRESSING DEI DISCRIMINATION BY FEDERAL CONTRACTORS AND TO INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING CLAUSES:
1) REVISED - 52.244-6 SUBCONTRACTS FOR COMMERCIAL PRODUCTS AND COMMERCIAL SERVICES (OCT 2025) (DEVIATION APR 2026)
2) ADDED - 52.222-90, ADDRESSING DEI DISCRIMINATION BY FEDERAL CONTRACTORS (APR 2026) (DEVIATION) THE EFFECTIVE DATE FOR THIS CLAUSE IS JULY 24, 2026.
THE CHANGES IN THIS MODIFICATION APPLY TO ALL EXISTING AND FUTURE ORDERS UNDER THIS CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- OTHER IT AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
